title: まずは、なかよくなるため

text_block_list.text: On the way home for the day...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The two of us are currently working hard in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The two of us are currently working hard in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But it still feels like I'm lacking something.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Since I just started at the academy, I need to
make way more friends. ☆

As I drop a grinning Curren Chan off at the
dorms...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. My apologies, but fret not. She's always
like this.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Sweep. This is just the entrance. It's
time for everyone to come back to the dorm, so—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! I'm gonna bask in the moonlight!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm serious this time! I read it in a book!
Moonlight gives you magical powers!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... so that's why she refuses to move.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, as the dorm leader, I can't just let
her do that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All right, you little witch. Let's get you back to
the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!
choice_data_list: ...Looks like this is going to take a while.
...Looks like this is going to take a while.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... We can't just sit back and do nothing,
though... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If Sweepy doesn't go back to the dorm, that
means there's gonna be an extra Jiggly Pudding
tonight, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Did you just say pudding?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If there's an extra, is it okay if I eat it? I just
looove that sweeeet, delicious Jiggly Pudding. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Drool...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm gonna have two puddings tonight! ♪ Twooo!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Don't take my pudding!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. You're funny, Curren.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Your mastery of language has the power to move
others into action... Don't tell me you're a witch
too?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, of course not, silly.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I can be just as self-centered as Sweepy, so I
could guess exactly how she'd feel... Teehee. ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I can be just as self-centered as Sweepy, so I
could guess exactly how she'd feel... Teehee. ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's true. After all, the thing that was on my
mind more than anything was...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Getting back to the dorm before you started
worrying!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Getting back to the dorm before you started
worrying!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's pretty self-centered, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha. What an adorable thing to be self-centered
about.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, isn't it? Well, as long as you think it's cute,
I'm happy!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... In that case, I'm gonna ask for one more
thing! Hey, Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes, Curren? What can I do for you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if you ever need more help, 'kay? As
long as you don't mind that I'm a little
self-centered. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. My, oh my... I may have to take you up on
that sometime.

After that, I start seeing Curren Chan and Fuji
Kiseki talking to each other more often.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey! You're supposed to deny that!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey! You're supposed to deny that!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What do you think of my self-centered attitude?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What do you think of my self-centered attitude?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! You said I'm cute again! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You two are definitely on the same
page—like a self-centered princess and her loyal
retainer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Then I'll ask you to be the royal advisor,
Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let me know right away if you ever need
anything. ♪ We gotta help each other out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Now even I've got a role...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But my liege does seem reliable. Perhaps I could
be so bold as to request your assistance
somewhere down the road.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, by all means. ♪

After that, I start seeing Curren Chan and Fuji
Kiseki talking to each other more often.
